title: 阿里将把通义千问 AI 接入淘宝，推出智能体式购物服务
content: 阿里巴巴计划将通义千问与淘宝打通融合，以对话式交互重塑购物模式。整合后，消费者在通义千问应用中与 AI 对话即可完成购物，通义千问将接入超 40 亿款商品库，提供全流程服务并智能推荐商品。淘宝 App 还将上线 AI 购物助手，具备虚拟试穿等功能。这凸显了中外电商平台发展路径差异，国内电商可将 AI 嵌入交易全流程，海外平台布局更为分散保守。 阿里巴巴 计划将通义千问与 淘宝 打通融合，以对话式交互重塑购物模式。整合后，消费者在通义千问应用中与 AI 对话即可完成购物，通义千问将接入超 40 亿款商品库，提供全流程服务并智能推荐商品。 淘宝 App 还将上线 AI 购物助手，具备虚拟试穿等功能。这凸显了中外电商平台发展路径差异，国内电商可将 AI 嵌入交易全流程，海外平台布局更为分散保守。 千问官宣与淘宝全面打通：支持商品挑选、对比及下单购买 IT 之家 / DoNews / 金融界 2026-04-22 阿里巴巴发布千问 AI 数字人形象「千问小酒窝」 2026-04-21 阿里申请「千问小酒窝」商标，涉及 AI、机器人等多领域 2026-03-30 阿里巴巴国际站总经理：AI 智能体催生「一人公司」潮 2026-03-16 阿里巴巴据悉计划推出面向企业，基于千问模型的 AI 智能体 2026-03-05 阿里巴巴成立杭州瓴通智能科技公司 注册资本 1000 万 2026-03-02 阿里巴巴 AI 品牌统一为千问 2026-01-29 字节、阿里将于 2 月推出新 AI 模型 2026-01-16 千问 App 测试 AI 购物，带动阿里股价再次站上 170 美元 2026-01-16 阿里千问 App 上线 400 多项 AI 办事新功能 2026-01-15 千问 App 接入淘宝、支付宝、高德、飞猪等阿里生态业务 查看更多 专业版功能 登录 体验专业版特色功能，拓展更丰富、更全面的相关内容。 行业标签 © 2026 NoCode 无码科技（杭州）有限公司 浙ICP备17005035号-6 联系我们 加入我们 产品介绍

eventKey: 阿里将把通义千问-接入淘宝-推出智能体式购物服务
normalizedTitle: 阿里将把通义千问 ai 接入淘宝 推出智能体式购物服务
representativeSources: Readhub - 每日早报 - 格隆汇
scoreReasoning: AI大模型落地核心电商场景的明确产品信号。影响行业竞争与技术应用走向。
summary: Alibaba will integrate its Qwen AI model into Taobao, enabling conversational shopping. Users will chat with Qwen to browse and purchase from a catalog of over 4 billion products, receive end‑to‑end assistance and smart recommendations. The Taobao app will also launch an AI shopping assistant featuring virtual try‑on and other features, illustrating the Chinese approach of embedding AI throughout the transaction flow compared to more cautious overseas platforms.

title: OpenAI职位成AI时代“超级彩票”：员工获准最高套现3,000万美元
content: OpenAI has expanded stock‑sale limits for employees. After the launch of ChatGPT, many new hires were required to wait two years before selling company shares. The company now allows each employee to sell up to $30 million worth of stock.

title: Marc Andreessen on Builder Culture in the Age of AI
content: Marc Andreessen discusses AI’s influence on culture and economics, noting how fear and hype shape public view while real use demonstrates AI boosts productivity without cutting jobs. He highlights the rise of “AI-native” builders, the shift toward generalist roles, and how companies restructure around this talent. The conversation also covers media’s changing authority, trust, and generational attitudes, offering a broad look at technology’s impact on societal systems.
source: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (Marc Andreessen, Erik Torenberg)

normalizedTitle: marc andreessen on builder culture in the age of ai

summary: Marc Andreessen discusses AI’s influence on culture and economics, noting how fear and hype shape public view while real use demonstrates AI boosts productivity without cutting jobs. He highlights the rise of “AI-native” builders, the shift toward generalist roles, and how companies restructure around this talent. The conversation also covers media’s changing authority, trust, and generational attitudes, offering a broad look at technology’s impact on societal systems.

title: Amazon Quick: Accelerating the path from enterprise data to AI-powered decisions
content: Amazon Quick helps turn your large enterprise data into fast and accurate AI-powered decisions. In this post, you will learn about five new capabilities of Amazon Quick that accelerate how data professionals deliver trusted AI-powered insights at enterprise scale. Artificial Intelligence Amazon Quick: Accelerating the path from enterprise data to AI-powered decisions by Shekhar Kopuri , Amy Marvin , Emily Zhu , Rushabh Vora , Sindhu Chandra , and Vignessh Baskaran on 11 MAY 2026 in Amazon Quick Suite , Announcements , Artificial Intelligence , Business Intelligence Permalink Comments Share Enterprise data with tens of millions of rows, row-level and column-level security, and dozens of datasets spanning multiple business domains need AI-generated answers that are trustworthy, reproducible, and fast, while respecting governance rules consistently. With foundation models (FMs), organizations can build systems that work well for small datasets where a business user asks a question about their data and gets an answer in seconds. Amazon Quick can also help turn your large enterprise data into fast and accurate AI-powered decisions. In this post, you will learn about five new capabilities of Amazon Quick that accelerate how data professionals deliver trusted AI-powered insights at enterprise scale. When a VP asks, “ How is churn trending for this product? “, getting that answer means either finding the right dashboard (if one exists for that exact cut) or waiting for an analyst to write a query and validate the result. The gap between having a question and having a trustworthy an
